products.desc:
NordicTrack T Series 6.5S Folding Treadmill — Get Fit Without Leaving Home

This is the treadmill that actually gets used. Foldable enough for a spare bedroom, powerful enough for serious training — the NordicTrack T Series 6.5S hits the sweet spot between performance and practicality.

What you get:

• Speeds up to 10 MPH — walk, jog, or run

• 0–10% OneTouch incline for serious calorie burn

• FlexSelect cushioning to protect your joints

• 300 lb weight capacity

• 5” LCD display + device shelf

• Bluetooth heart-rate compatible

• EasyLift folding design for compact storage

Amazon’s Choice | 4.5 Stars | Best Seller in Home Treadmills
